    Publications

    You can find a full list my of articles on NASA/ADS .

    First Author Papers

    Constraints on the early Universe star formation efficiency from galaxy clustering and halo modeling of H\(\alpha\) and [O III] emitters

    Published in A&A, 2025

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2025, A&A 699, A231
    Download Paper

    COSMOS2025: The COSMOS-Web galaxy catalog of photometry, morphology, redshifts, and physical parameters from JWST, HST, and ground-based imaging

    Published in arxiv, 2025

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2025, A&A subm
    Download Paper

    The COSMOS-Web ring: Spectroscopic confirmation of the background source at \(z = 5.1\)

    Published in A&A, 2025

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2025, A&A 696, L14
    Download Paper

    COSMOS-Web: Stellar mass assembly in relation to dark matter halos across \(0.2 < z < 12\) of cosmic history

    Published in A&A, 2025

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2025 A&A 695, A20
    Download Paper

    COSMOS2020: Cosmic evolution of the stellar-to-halo mass relation for central and satellite galaxies up to z ∼ 5

    Published in A&A, 2020

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2022 A&A 664, A61
    Download Paper

    PhotoWeb redshift: boosting photometric redshift accuracy with large spectroscopic surveys

    Published in A&A, 2020

    Recommended citation: Shuntov et al. 2025, A&A 636, A90
    Download Paper
